## ESTRUTURA

### Module 1: Frame Control Fundamentals

| # | Titulo | Tipo | Temas Principais |
|---|--------|------|-----------------|
| 01 | Introduction to Frames | video | Frame theory, social frames, power dynamics |
| 02 | The Four Primary Frames | video | Power frame, time frame, intrigue frame, prize frame |
| 03 | Frame Collisions | video | Frame stacking, frame disruption, recovery |
| 04 | Frame Control in Practice | video | Real-world examples, beta traps, alpha cues |
| 05 | Frame Exercises | pdf | Worksheets, drills, self-assessment |

### Module 2: The Crocodile Brain

| # | Titulo | Tipo | Temas Principais |
|---|--------|------|-----------------|
| 06 | Neuroscience of Decision-Making | video | Croc brain filtering, three-brain model, attention gates |
| 07 | Hot Cognition vs Cold Cognition | video | Wanting vs liking, emotional triggers, bypass analytics |
| 08 | Designing for the Croc Brain | video | Novelty, danger signals, social cues, pattern interrupts |
| 09 | Attention Windows | video | 20-minute rule, attention cycles, re-engagement tactics |
| 10 | Croc Brain Checklist | pdf | Pre-pitch diagnostic, message filtering test |

### Module 3: Status & Social Dynamics

| # | Titulo | Tipo | Temas Principais |
|---|--------|------|-----------------|
| 11 | Status as Biological Variable | video | Alpha/beta signaling, local star power, situational status |
| 12 | Prizing: You Are the Prize | video | Prizing philosophy, anti-neediness, abundance signaling |
| 13 | Beta Traps and How to Avoid Them | video | Common traps, waiting rooms, gatekeepers, time pressure |
| 14 | Status Alignment Protocol | video | Reading status, matching, elevating, status stacking |
| 15 | Social Dynamics Scenarios | pdf | Role-play scripts, status exercises |

### Module 4: The S.T.R.O.N.G. Method

| # | Titulo | Tipo | Temas Principais |
|---|--------|------|-----------------|
| 16 | S - Set the Frame | video | Opening frame, environment control, first impression |
| 17 | T - Tell the Story | video | Narrative structure, personal story, origin story, stakes |
| 18 | R - Reveal the Intrigue | video | Intrigue loops, tension creation, curiosity gaps |
| 19 | O - Offer the Prize | video | Prize framing, value presentation, scarcity signaling |
| 20 | N - Nail the Hookpoint | video | Hook point recognition, confirmation signals, momentum |
| 21 | G - Get a Decision | video | Closing sequence, decision framing, next steps |
| 22 | STRONG Complete Walkthrough | video | Full pitch demonstration, real-time annotation |
| 23 | STRONG Worksheet | pdf | Step-by-step planning template |

### Module 5: Advanced Pitch Architecture

| # | Titulo | Tipo | Temas Principais |
|---|--------|------|-----------------|
| 24 | The 14 Waypoint System | video | 14 sequential markers from open to close |
| 25 | Pitch Deck Sequence | video | Slide structure, visual hierarchy, information flow |
| 26 | The Four-Frame Hot Cognition Stack | video | Intrigue + Prize + Time + Moral Authority stacking |
| 27 | Hook Point Design | video | Engineering hook moments, 3-second test, calibration |
| 28 | Value Proposition Template | video | Problem-solution-mechanism-proof structure |
| 29 | Pre-Pitch Checklist | pdf | 15-point preparation protocol |
| 30 | Pitch Architecture Worksheet | pdf | Full pitch blueprint template |

### Module 6: Deal Closing & Immersion

| # | Titulo | Tipo | Temas Principais |
|---|--------|------|-----------------|
| 31 | Immersion Design Framework | video | Suspending analytical thinking, experience creation |
| 32 | Buying Temperature Management | video | Temperature reading, escalation, de-escalation |
| 33 | The Close: Beyond Technique | video | Decision architecture, autonomy preservation, timing |
| 34 | Handling Resistance (Not Objections) | video | Resistance vs objection distinction, frame re-establishment |
| 35 | Post-Pitch Protocol | video | Follow-up frames, deal momentum, ghost prevention |
| 36 | Closing Scenarios | pdf | 10 real-deal case studies with annotations |

## NOTAS

- **Modulo 4 (STRONG)** e o nucleo do curso e contem a maior densidade de elementos (68 elementos nos 8 arquivos).
- **Modulo 1 (Frame Control)** e a fundacao filosofica — predominantemente L1 (Filosofias) e L2 (Modelos Mentais).
- **Modulo 2 (Croc Brain)** e fortemente L2 (Modelos Mentais) com aplicacoes em L3 (Heuristicas).
- **Modulo 5 (Advanced)** contem os frameworks mais sofisticados (L4) e metodologias completas (L5).
- **Bonus Materials** incluem destilacao dos dois livros (Pitch Anything + Flip the Script) e case studies reais.
- **Worksheets e PDFs** sao material de suporte pratico — templates preenchidos durante o treinamento.
